'''The Lord of the Rings''' is a high-fantasy epic by [[J. R. R. Tolkien]].

== Overview ==
The story is set in [[Middle-earth]] and follows [[Frodo Baggins]] as he carries the [[One Ring]] toward [[Mordor]].

== Key Characters ==
* [[Frodo Baggins]]
* [[Gandalf]]
* [[Aragorn]]

== Key Places ==
* [[The Shire]]
* [[Rivendell]]
* [[Mordor]]

[[Category:Works]]
